title: 146154 3 Pin Starter Solenoid 12V, Replacement for MTD 109946 146154 1753539 AM138497 Lawn Mower, Replaces 1753539 AM138497
features: Fitment: Replacement for MTD 109946 146154 1753539 AM138497 Lawn Mower
Efficient Performance: Optimized design ensures fast response and reliable startup, enhancing the overall performance of the mower and helping you to complete lawn maintenance work efficiently
Endurance Property: Made of sturdy materials with good abrasion and corrosion resistance, extending service life and reducing the need for frequent replacement
Simple Installation: User-friendly design makes the installation process simple and straightforward, no specialized tools required, suitable for users of all skill levels, saves time and effort
description: Product Description 3 Pin Universal Magnetic Switch Solenoid Magnetic Switch Solenoid Package Includes: 1* 3 Pin Universal Magnetic Switch Solenoid 3 Pin Universal Magnetic Switch Solenoid Elevate Your Lawn Care with the Solenoid The Ollanoos 146154 3 Pin Universal Magnetic Switch Solenoid enhances lawn mower performance with its optimized design for quick response and reliable startup. Crafted from reliable materials, it offers abrasion and corrosion resistance, ensuring longevity Optimized design Reliable startup Corrosion resistance Replacement for MTD 109946 146154 Lawn Mower Replacement for MTD 1753539 Lawn Mower Replacement for MTD AM138497 Lawn Mower Specification: Color: Black and White Material: High-Strength Rubber Installation Method: Bolt-On Replace Part Number: 4416894, 1135600Q0A, 8200404271, 93853920, 6387198RMP Precautions: Safety First: Before installing, make sure the mower is turned off and disconnect the spark plug to prevent accidental starting. Removing the Old Solenoid: Carefully remove the existing solenoid, disconnect the wires and remove it from its mounting location. Installing the New Solenoid: Align the Ollanoos 146154 solenoid in the same position as the old solenoid. Secure with screws and reconnect wires to ensure correct polarity. Inspect Connections: Double inspect that all connections are tight and correctly placed to avoid any electrical problems. Test the Mower: Reconnect the spark plug and start the mower to ensure that the new solenoid is working correctly.
